Off Calendar Mar-25-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
PETITIONER DARRYL JONES' MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION - DUPLICATE ENTRY.

Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Mar-25-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Darryl Jones, Petitioner Propria Persona and Moving Party
Brian M. Affrunti, Esq., Law Offices of Larry D. Langley (408) 453-8878, for Respondent and Opposing Party Fort Knox Storage
RULING:
Court directs Counsel to attempt to resolve this matter; passed. Counsel present; off the record, resolution discussed. PETITIONER DARRYL JONES' Motion For Preliminary Injunction is GRANTED. The Court orders Respondent to conduct, in the presence of Petitioner, an inventory of the items belonging to Petitioner stored in the locker at Fort Knox Storage; a neutral third party may be present. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
